title: Evergy (EVRG) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Evergy Inc. (NASDAQ:EVRG ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call February 24, 2023 9:00 AM ET Company Participants David Campbell - President, Chief Executive Officer Kirk Andrews - Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer Peter Flynn - Director, Investor Relations Conference Call Participants Michael Sullivan - Wolfe Research Shahriar Pourreza - Guggenheim Nicholas Campanella - Credit Suisse Durgesh Chopra - Evercore Angie Storozynski - Seaport Paul Patterson - Glenrock Associates Ashar Khan - Verition Operator Thank you for standing by, and welcome to Evergy's fourth quarter 2022 earnings conference call. At this time, all participants are in a listen-only mode.

title: Evergy's (EVRG) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Evergy's (EVRG) fourth-quarter earnings are better than estimates due to higher electric sales volume.

title: Evergy Inc (EVRG) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Evergy (EVRG) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 36.36% and 10.29%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: EVRG or WMB: Which Is the Better Value Stock Right Now?
text: EVRG vs. WMB: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?

title: Evergy schedules conference call to discuss 4th quarter results
text: KANSAS CITY, Mo.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Evergy, Inc. (NASDAQ: EVRG) announced today it will release its 2022 fourth quarter earnings Friday, Feb. 24, 2023, before market open. The company plans to host its quarterly conference call and audio webcast to discuss the results Friday, Feb. 24, 2023.
